metadata.name: vesta_core
metadata.description: VESTA living loyalty protocol: merchants, campaigns, points, alliances, badges

instructions.name: anchor_merchant_statement
docs: Anchor a period's economic-decision Merkle root on-chain (owner) —
tamper-evident, provably complete (spec 13 §4.4).

instructions.name: attest_reserve
docs: Emit a permissionless proof-of-reserves snapshot.

accounts.name: customer_profile
docs: Per-customer clawback stats; created if the customer holds points via a
swap without ever having earned at this merchant.

accounts.name: customer_ata
docs: The customer's point account — bound to the mint and the customer.

instructions.name: close_merchant
docs: Delete a merchant (only when its point supply is zero).

accounts.name: merchant_segments
docs: Optional verified-segment definitions (spec 12). When present with a fresh
`customer_eligibility`, satisfied segments add their `boost_bps`.

accounts.name: customer_eligibility
docs: Optional cached eligibility for `customer` (paired with `merchant_segments`).

instructions.name: earn_points_campaign
docs: Earn with a governed campaign applied (multiplier / flat bonus / quest).

accounts.name: extra_account_meta_list
docs: owned by argus before the hook authority is burned (spec §3.2).

instructions.name: fund_reserve
docs: Deposit backing stablecoin into the reserve (owner-only).

accounts.name: payer
docs: Permissionless: anyone (the customer, a keeper, or the merchant) may
grant an *earned* badge. It always goes to the customer, is threshold-
gated, and the KleosReceipt prevents duplicates — so the only thing an
arbitrary caller can do is pay to distribute a badge the customer earned.

accounts.name: badge_ata
docs: does not exist when Anchor constraints run).

accounts.name: kleos_receipt
docs: The double-grant guard: init fails if it already exists — and it
survives a holder-side badge burn.

accounts.name: alliance_authority
docs: Handshake: unilateral joins cannot spoof rates (spec §3.6).

accounts.name: config
docs: (PDA seeds, discriminator, stored admin, and v1 length).

instructions.name: open_reserve
docs: Open a stablecoin-backed liability reserve for the merchant (owner-only).

accounts.name: merchant_segments
docs: Optional verified-segment gate accounts (spec 12 §4.5), required only when
the offer sets `required_segment`.

instructions.name: refresh_customer_eligibility
docs: Permissionless: refresh a customer's cached verdict for one segment by
CPI-ing aegis `verify` off the hot path (spec 12 §4.1).

accounts.name: attestation
docs: aegis re-derives and owner-checks it — a wrong/missing account yields a
negative verdict (fail safe).

accounts.name: mint
docs: address is enforced by the PDA seeds.

accounts.name: treasury
docs: does not exist yet when Anchor constraints run); address verified there.

instructions.name: reverify_merchant
docs: Permissionless crank: re-check the merchant's aegis accreditation and
auto-degrade (after grace) or auto-restore its issuance posture.

accounts.name: aegis_trust_root
docs: here from the anchor's own root so a crank cannot substitute accounts.

instructions.name: set_campaign_winback
docs: Turn a campaign into a winback — pays only customers inactive for
`min_days_inactive` days (spec 12 §4.3). `0` disables.

instructions.name: set_clawback_cap
docs: Set the merchant's daily clawback cap (raw units; 0 = unlimited).

instructions.name: set_daily_issue_cap
docs: Set the merchant's daily issuance cap in raw points (0 = unlimited) —
the issuance-side blast-radius limiter (spec 13 §4.2).

instructions.name: set_member_active
docs: Alliance authority suspends / reactivates a member.

instructions.name: set_merchant_governance
docs: Adopt/update/disable scoped operator roles — separation of duties
(spec 13 §4.1). Owner-only, opt-in.

instructions.name: set_merchant_issue_status
docs: Owner manual issuance-posture override — emergency freeze, or restore to
NORMAL after resolving a dispute.

instructions.name: set_merchant_segments
docs: Define the merchant's verified segments (owner-only). Each segment is an
aegis `(issuer, schema)` predicate occupying one verdict-bitmap slot.

instructions.name: set_merchant_trust
docs: Bind the merchant's authority-to-issue to an aegis accreditation root
(owner-only). Configures the fall-to posture + grace window.

instructions.name: set_offer_segment
docs: Gate/ungate an offer on a verified segment (spec 12 §4.5).

accounts.name: alliance_authority
docs: The inbound-swap budget is the alliance's risk control over how much a
member can be minted-into; it needs the alliance authority's co-sign too,
mirroring `SetSwapRate` (AUDIT L-3).

accounts.name: alliance_authority
docs: Anti-manipulation: rate changes need the alliance authority too.

instructions.name: set_token_attribute
docs: Attach/update a custom metadata attribute on the point token (enrichment).

accounts.name: point_mint
docs: is the merchant PDA. Written by the Token-2022 metadata update.

instructions.name: update_decay_rate
docs: Update the point token's interest-bearing (decay) rate.

accounts.name: point_mint
docs: is the merchant PDA. Written by the Token-2022 metadata update.

instructions.name: update_token_metadata
docs: Update a core token metadata field (0=name, 1=symbol, 2=uri).

accounts.name: point_mint
docs: is the merchant PDA. Written by the Token-2022 metadata update.

instructions.name: withdraw_reserve
docs: Withdraw from the reserve — rejected if it would drop below the coverage
required to back the point mint's current supply (owner-only).

accounts.name: point_mint
docs: The point mint — its raw `supply` is the outstanding liability.

errors.name: PendingAdminMismatch
errors.msg: Pending admin does not match signer

errors.name: InvalidDecayRate
errors.msg: Decay rate must be within -10000..=0 bps

errors.name: InvalidEarnRate
errors.msg: Base earn rate out of bounds

errors.name: StaleVisitDay
errors.msg: visit_day does not match the current UTC day

errors.name: EarnCapExceeded
errors.msg: Earn amount exceeds the per-transaction cap

errors.name: CampaignInactive
errors.msg: Campaign is not active in the current window

errors.name: CampaignNotEligible
errors.msg: Customer does not meet the campaign's eligibility (spend/tier)

errors.name: SwapRateOutOfBounds
errors.msg: Swap rate is outside the alliance's governance bounds

errors.name: ReasonRequired
errors.msg: Clawback requires a non-zero reason code

errors.name: ClawbackExceedsBalance
errors.msg: Clawback amount exceeds the customer's balance

errors.name: MerchantNotEmpty
errors.msg: Merchant cannot be closed while points are in circulation

errors.name: MintMismatch
errors.msg: Mint does not match the merchant point mint

errors.name: AlreadyInAlliance
errors.msg: Merchant already belongs to an alliance

errors.name: InvalidAmount
errors.msg: Amount must be greater than zero

errors.name: ConversionFailed
errors.msg: Conversion return data missing or malformed

errors.name: IssuanceFrozen
errors.msg: Issuance is frozen — merchant accreditation is degraded

errors.name: InvalidIssueStatus
errors.msg: Degrade target must be a real frozen posture

errors.name: MerchantTrustMissing
errors.msg: Merchant trust anchor is not configured

errors.name: AegisProgramMismatch
errors.msg: aegis program does not match the merchant's configured deployment

errors.name: InvalidGrace
errors.msg: Grace window is out of range

errors.name: ReserveCoverageBreach
errors.msg: Withdrawal would drop the reserve below required coverage

errors.name: InvalidSegment
errors.msg: Segment index is invalid or inactive

errors.name: OfferSegmentGated
errors.msg: Offer is restricted to a verified segment the customer does not satisfy

types.name: Achievement
docs: Kleos badge definition (phase 3). `merchant` first for memcmp catalogs.

types.name: Alliance
docs: Koinon alliance root; creator in the seeds kills permissionless id squatting.
Enterprise surface: alliance-level pause, member swap-rate governance bounds,
a swap spread (`fee_bps`, an anti-abuse haircut on cross-swaps), a display
category + metadata URI, and aggregate swap stats.

fields.name: paused
docs: Freeze all cross-swaps in the alliance.

fields.name: fee_bps
docs: Spread applied to each swap's output UI value (anti-abuse / spread), bps.

fields.name: min_rate_bps
docs: Governance bounds on member `rate_bps_to_alliance` (0 = unbounded).

types.name: AllianceMember
docs: Alliance membership: normalized swap rate + inbound-swap risk budget + stats.

types.name: Campaign
docs: A merchant engagement campaign (phase 3, enterprise/gamified). `merchant`
first for memcmp catalogs.

fields.name: kind
docs: `campaign_kind::*`.

fields.name: multiplier_bps
docs: MULTIPLIER: additive earn boost, bps (stacks with streak, jointly capped).

fields.name: flat_bonus
docs: FLAT_BONUS: raw points added per qualifying earn.

fields.name: quest_target
docs: QUEST: qualifying earns required to complete.

fields.name: quest_reward
docs: QUEST: raw-point reward on completion.

fields.name: min_spend_base
docs: Minimum qualifying spend (base minor units) for the campaign to apply.

fields.name: min_tier
docs: Minimum customer tier (VIP targeting).

fields.name: points_budget
docs: Total bonus-point budget; 0 = unlimited. Campaign stops paying when hit.

fields.name: per_customer_cap
docs: Max bonus a single customer may draw; 0 = unlimited.

fields.name: redemptions
docs: Count of qualifying applications (payouts).

fields.name: created_slot
docs: Slot at creation. Because a campaign PDA (`[campaign, merchant, id]`) is
reusable after close, this distinguishes one instance of an id from the
next so stale CampaignProgress cannot bleed across (AUDIT M-3).

fields.name: min_days_inactive
docs: Winback targeting (spec 12 §4.3): when `> 0`, the campaign pays only
customers whose last visit was at least this many days ago. Appended.

types.name: CampaignProgress
docs: Per-(campaign, customer) participation state — enforces per-customer caps
and tracks quest progress. Created on first qualifying earn.

fields.name: campaign_slot
docs: `Campaign.created_slot` of the instance this progress belongs to. A
mismatch means the id was closed and recreated → treat as fresh.

fields.name: visits
docs: Qualifying earns applied (quest counter).

fields.name: bonus_drawn
docs: Bonus raw points drawn by this customer under the campaign.

fields.name: completed
docs: Quest completed (reward already paid).

fields.name: actor
docs: The key that authorized this clawback (owner or operator).

fields.name: balance_after
docs: Customer's remaining balance after the clawback.

fields.name: clawed_today
docs: Merchant's cumulative raw amount clawed back today.

types.name: Config
docs: Global protocol config. Singleton PDA.

types.name: CustomerEligibility
docs: Cached per-customer segment verdicts (spec 12 §4.1) — the merchant-side twin
of argus's `EligibilityCapability`. `refresh_customer_eligibility` pays aegis's
`verify` CPI off the hot path and folds the result into `verdicts`; earn /
offers / campaigns then read the bitmap with no CPI. Fails closed on any
stale / epoch-mismatched / spoofed cache.

fields.name: verdicts
docs: Bit `i` set = segment `i` predicate satisfied.

fields.name: kyc_tier
docs: Provenance captured from the last verdict (spec 12 §4.1 CORRIDOR).

fields.name: policy_epoch
docs: `MerchantSegments.policy_epoch` at mint time; must still match to be valid.

fields.name: aegis_program
docs: aegis deployment consulted.

types.name: CustomerProfile
docs: Per merchant-customer pair.

fields.name: lifetime_spend_base
docs: Total qualifying spend (base minor units) seen across earns.

fields.name: campaigns_completed
docs: Count of quest-style campaigns completed.

fields.name: lifetime_clawed_back
docs: Lifetime raw points reclaimed from this customer via clawback.

types.name: KleosReceipt
docs: Double-grant guard that survives a holder-side badge burn.

types.name: Merchant
docs: One record per (authority, id) — a wallet owns MANY merchants (multi-brand /
multi-location). `id` + `authority` are the PDA seeds. Field order is an ABI:
argus reads `id`/`authority`/`point_mint`/`treasury` by fixed offset, so the
fixed-size prefix below must not be reordered.
Enterprise surface: a cold `authority` (owner) plus up to `MAX_OPERATORS`
hot delegate keys that may run day-to-day operations (earn, campaigns,
achievements) without the owner key; a merchant-level pause; an admin-set
`verified` trust flag; a display category + metadata URI; lifetime stats.

fields.name: operators
docs: Hot operational keys (earn/campaigns/achievements). Owner is implicit.

fields.name: paused
docs: Merchant-scoped freeze of earn/redeem, independent of the global pause.

fields.name: verified
docs: Protocol-admin-set trust badge (e.g. KYB-verified brand).

fields.name: category
docs: Display category (free-form enum; UI maps to a label).

fields.name: metadata_uri
docs: Off-chain profile JSON (logo, links, description).

fields.name: lifetime_clawed_back
docs: Lifetime raw points reclaimed via clawback (audit metric).

fields.name: clawback_daily_cap_raw
docs: Max raw points clawable per UTC day; 0 = unlimited. Defense-in-depth cap
on the owner-only clawback action (owner key compromise).

fields.name: issue_status
docs: Live issuance posture (`issue_status::*`), driven by `reverify_merchant`.
`NORMAL` for a merchant that never adopts accreditation, so the earn gate
is a no-op until opt-in.

fields.name: daily_issue_cap_raw
docs: Max raw points mintable per UTC day; `0` = unlimited. Symmetric to
`clawback_daily_cap_raw` — bounds the blast radius of a compromised
operator key on the *issuance* side (the far larger surface).

fields.name: governance_enabled
docs: When set, the flat `operators`/`can_operate` model is replaced by scoped
roles below — the mint path needs the `cashier` key, campaign/offer/badge
creation needs `campaign_manager`. Opt-in; off = today's behavior.

fields.name: cashier
docs: May run the mint path (`earn_points`, `earn_points_campaign`).

fields.name: campaign_manager
docs: May create campaigns, offers, and achievements.

fields.name: automatic
docs: True when set by the permissionless crank; false for a manual override.

types.name: MerchantReserve
docs: Point-liability reserve (spec 11 §4.2), seeds `["mreserve", merchant]`. Escrows
a caller-chosen stablecoin against outstanding point liability so issuance can
be shown solvent. Liability is measured on the point mint's **raw supply** —
exact and decay-conservative (as points decay, raw supply is unchanged, so
backing raw over-collateralizes rather than under).

fields.name: backing_mint
docs: The escrowed backing mint (SPL or Token-2022 stablecoin).

fields.name: reserve_ata
docs: PDA-owned escrow token account (authority = this reserve PDA).

fields.name: unit_value
docs: Stable minor units backing one raw point (governance-set; no oracle).

fields.name: target_ratio_bps
docs: Target reserve ratio, bps (10_000 = fully backed; below = fractional).

types.name: MerchantSegments
docs: Per-merchant verified-segment definitions (spec 12 §4.1), seeds
`["segments", merchant]`. Bounded, versioned; `policy_epoch` bumps on any
change so stale eligibility caches are rejected.

types.name: MerchantStatement
docs: Tamper-evident anchor for a period's economic decisions (spec 13 §4.4),
seeds `["mstmt", merchant, period_le]`. An off-chain indexer folds the
period's earns / redemptions / clawbacks into a Merkle tree; the merchant
owner anchors its root here. `decision_count` makes the statement provably
complete — an omission changes both the count and the root. The merchant-side
analogue of argus's `StatementCommitment`.

types.name: MerchantTrust
docs: Accredited merchant identity (spec 11 §4.1), seeds `["mtrust", merchant]`.
The merchant-side analogue of argus's `TrustAnchor`: binds the merchant's
authority to *issue* to an aegis accreditation root. The permissionless
`reverify_merchant` crank re-checks the chain and, after a grace window,
trips `Merchant.issue_status` to `degrade_target` — freezing earn (never
redemption/clawback). Auto-restores on the next healthy crank.

fields.name: accreditation_root
docs: aegis accreditation root the merchant's KYB identity must chain to.

fields.name: subject_issuer
docs: The merchant's aegis subject/issuer identity being verified.

fields.name: required_schema
docs: Required accreditation schema ("KYB type").

fields.name: aegis_program
docs: aegis deployment (verify_accreditation target).

fields.name: degrade_target
docs: Posture to fall to on sustained failure (`EARN_FROZEN`/`REDEMPTION_ONLY`).

fields.name: grace_secs
docs: Seconds a failing streak must persist before auto-degrade bites.

fields.name: failing_since
docs: Unix ts the current failing streak began (`0` = healthy).

fields.name: tier
docs: Accreditation provenance captured from the verdict.

types.name: Offer
docs: Redemption catalog entry. `merchant` is deliberately the first field so
getProgramAccounts can memcmp on it at offset 8.

fields.name: price_points
docs: Denominated in UI points ×10² (post-decay purchasing power).

fields.name: required_segment
docs: Verified-segment gate (spec 12 §4.5): `0` = open to all; else the customer
must satisfy segment index `required_segment - 1` to redeem. Appended.

types.name: Receipt
docs: Voucher for a redemption; indexed by the profile's on-chain counter.

types.name: ReserveAttested
docs: Proof-of-reserves snapshot (spec 11 §4.2) — permissionless, examiner-facing.

types.name: Segment
docs: One verified-customer segment (spec 12 §4.1). A segment is satisfied when the
customer holds a valid aegis credential of `(issuer, schema_id)` — the merchant
learns only that the predicate holds, never the underlying PII. (A follow-on
upgrades `issuer/schema_id` to a named aegis `Policy` consumed via
`verify_policy`; the cache shape is unchanged.)

fields.name: ttl_secs
docs: Cache TTL for this segment's verdict (0 = protocol default).

fields.name: boost_bps
docs: Additive earn boost (bps) applied when a customer satisfies this segment;
composed with streak, jointly re-clamped to the ×2.4 ceiling.

types.name: UpdateCampaignArgs
docs: Partial in-flight retune. Owner may extend the window, grow the budget,
adjust the per-customer cap, or pause/resume — not change the kind or its
core payout params (those define the offer customers signed up for).

constants.name: CAMPAIGN_MAX_BPS
docs: Per-campaign multiplier bound (2.0×).

constants.name: CUSTOMER_ELIGIBILITY_SEED
docs: Per-(merchant, customer) cached eligibility verdict (spec 12 §4.1): `["celig", merchant, customer]`.

constants.name: DECIMALS
docs: UI points carry two implied decimals; all mints.

constants.name: MAX_ALLIANCE_FEE_BPS
docs: Alliance swap spread ceiling (10%).

constants.name: MAX_CAMPAIGN_BONUS
docs: Bonus-point ceiling for a single flat-bonus / quest payout, raw units
(= 10 000.00 pts). Bounds abuse of campaign bonuses.

constants.name: MAX_EARN_PER_TX
docs: Earn cap per transaction, raw units (= 10 000.00 pts).

constants.name: MAX_QUEST_TARGET
docs: Max quest length (qualifying visits).

constants.name: MAX_TOTAL_MULTIPLIER_BPS
docs: Joint cap over streak + campaign composition (2.4×).

constants.name: MERCHANT_RESERVE_SEED
docs: Per-merchant point-liability reserve (spec 11 §4.2): `["mreserve", merchant]`.

constants.name: MERCHANT_STATEMENT_SEED
docs: Per-(merchant, period) decision-statement anchor (spec 13 §4.4): `["mstmt", merchant, period]`.

constants.name: MERCHANT_TRUST_SEED
docs: Per-merchant accreditation anchor (spec 11): `["mtrust", merchant]`.

constants.name: MIN_BASE_EARN_RATE
docs: `base_earn_rate` bounds: raw points per fiat minor unit (cent).

constants.name: SEGMENTS_SEED
docs: Per-merchant verified-segment definitions (spec 12 §4.1): `["segments", merchant]`.

constants.name: STREAK_BPS_PER_DAY
docs: +2%/day of streak, capped at 30 days (≤ +6 000 bps).
